name: retail-digital
description: E-Commerce & Digital Retail preset pack, encompassing merchandising planners, digital marketing growth loops, and green logistics/sustainability overlays. Grounded in commerce standard taxonomies (Google Analytics 4 Enhanced Ecommerce schema, standard retail merchandising math).

subVerticals.name: merchandising
subVerticals.description: Gross margin return on investment (GMROI), sell-through velocity, inventory turn, markdowns.

subVerticals.name: digital-marketing
subVerticals.description: Customer acquisition cost (CAC), LTV, ROAS, conversion funnel, retention cohorts.

subVerticals.name: sustainability
subVerticals.description: Cross-cutting overlay: packaging circularity, transportation carbon intensity, Scope 3 EPR.

references.label: GHG Protocol Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Standard
